meaning: n.北爱尔兰人,乌尔斯特人
examples: Their father was an Ulsterman from New Brunswick and their mother was of Spanish and Portuguese stock, Gomes y Cáceres, from Curaçao.
The Ulsterman asked the referee if there was a penalty and he was told there was none.
McDowell's pairing with fellow Ulsterman and good friend McIlroy would form one of the most exciting partnerships for Europe.
The Ulsterman has also won in GP2, British Formula 3, British Formula Ford and was a test driver for BAR-Honda.
